Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.metaDescription: Policy regarding personal information collection and processing
Privacy.section1Content: This blog uses Google Analytics to collect anonymized visitor statistics (page views, visit duration, approximate location, etc.). We do not collect personally identifiable information.
Privacy.section2Content: This blog uses cookies to improve user experience and for analytics purposes. You can disable cookies through your browser settings, but some features may be limited.
Privacy.section3Content: The collected information is used solely for improving blog operations, analyzing visitor statistics, and enhancing content quality.
Privacy.section4Content: If you have any questions about our privacy practices, please contact us through the About page.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.copyrightContent: All content on this blog (articles, images, code, etc.) is protected by copyright law unless otherwise stated. Personal reference is permitted, but commercial use or unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
Terms.disclaimerContent: The information on this blog is based on personal experience and learning. While we strive for accuracy, technical information may become outdated over time. We are not legally responsible for any outcomes resulting from the use of information on this blog.
Terms.usageContent: When using this blog, please respect the rights of others and do not use it for any illegal purposes.
